name: Stock Ticker
description: Live scrolling stock ticker powered by the free Finnhub.io API.

schema.name: apikey
schema.label: Finnhub API Key
schema.description: Free API key from finnhub.io — no credit card required.
schema.placeholder: Get your free key at https://finnhub.io/register

schema.name: refresh_seconds
schema.label: Refresh Every (seconds)
schema.description: How often to fetch fresh price data. Minimum 30s.

schema.name: direction
schema.label: Scroll Direction
schema.description: Horizontal scrolls left; Vertical scrolls up.

schema.name: scroll_speed
schema.label: Scroll Speed (px/s)
schema.description: Pixels per second. 20 = slow, 50 = medium, 100 = fast.

schema.name: theme
schema.label: Colour Theme
schema.description: Visual colour scheme for the ticker.

schema.name: loops
schema.label: Loops Before Advancing
schema.description: Number of complete ticker cycles before moving to the next playlist item. 0 = loop forever.

schema.name: duration
schema.label: Duration (seconds)
schema.description: Hard time limit before advancing. Used as a fallback when Loops is 0.
